description: This is a three-drawer dresser with a dark wood finish and brass hardware. The dresser is rectangular in shape with clean lines and stands on four tapered legs. Each drawer has a horizontal brass pull. The overall design is simple and modern, making it a versatile piece that can fit into various decor styles. The dark wood and brass combination lends a touch of elegance and sophistication. The dresser appears to be made of solid wood and the brass handles suggest quality craftsmanship. It's a functional piece for storing clothes or other items.
